name: The Chapada Hiker
summary: Breathtaking hike through the lush trails of Chapada Diamantina
description:
Get ready for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Bahia. Chapada Diamantina offers imposing mountains, crystal-clear waterfalls, and mysterious caves. During this trail, you will be immersed in lush nature and fascinating local culture.
Hike through deep valleys and climb to the highest viewpoints for breathtaking views. Every step reveals a new natural wonder, making this experience perfect for nature lovers and pure adventurers.

name: The Costa Verde Explorer
summary: Exploring the jaw-dropping Brazilian Costa Verde by foot and by boat
description:
Discover the magic where the Atlantic Forest meets the crystal-clear sea. Costa Verde is a paradise of deserted beaches, heavenly islands, and incredible marine biodiversity. We will sail through calm waters and hike along historic coastal trails.
Enjoy the radiant sun, dive into secret bays, and relax to the sound of the waves. This expedition is the perfect combination of relaxation on pristine beaches and exploration of vibrant coastal ecosystems.

name: The Catarina Snow Adventurer
summary: Rare and exciting frosty adventure catching the winter snow in Serra Catarinense
description:
Challenge the cold in the stunning landscapes of Serra Catarinense. One of the rare regions in Brazil where snow transforms the scenery into a white spectacle, offering a unique tropical winter experience. Feel the icy breeze as you explore impressive valleys and canyons.
Warm up with the heat of southern hospitality, savoring local cuisine and regional wines by the fireplace after an intense day of adventures in the ice and frost.

name: The Colonial City Wanderer
summary: Living the life of Wanderlust in Brazil's most beautiful historical cities like Ouro Preto and Paraty
description:
Step back in time walking through the charming cobblestone streets of Ouro Preto and Paraty. This cultural itinerary takes you to immerse yourself in Brazil's rich colonial history, admiring the baroque architecture and churches adorned with gold. Every corner tells a story of centuries past.
Beyond the historical immersion, enjoy the vibrant art scene, literary festivals, and unparalleled gastronomy. A journey that beautifully and unforgettably connects the past and the present.

name: The Lençóis Camper
summary: Breathing in Nature in Brazil's most spectacular National Parks like Lençóis Maranhenses
description:
Camp under a starry sky in the middle of one of the most surreal landscapes on the planet. Lençóis Maranhenses, with its endless white sand dunes and turquoise freshwater lagoons, provide a visual spectacle that defies the imagination. Feel the texture of the fine sand as you walk to your private oasis.
Experience the absolute peace of the Brazilian desert and wake up to the sunrise reflecting in the clear waters. A true disconnection from modern life to reconnect with the essence of wild nature.

name: The Tropical Sports Lover
summary: Surfing in Florianópolis, hang gliding in Rio, rock climbing and more, all in one tour
description:
Adrenaline will rise on this journey designed for extreme sports addicts. From the perfect waves of Florianópolis to hang gliding flights over the iconic Rio de Janeiro, along with challenging rock climbs, this tour is action from start to finish. Feel the wind in your face and your heart beating faster.
It's not just about the sport, but about the connection with the vibrant energy of Brazil. After each physical challenge, celebrate your achievements by enjoying the authentic Brazilian vibe with lots of music, beach, and joy.

name: The Gaucho Wine Taster
summary: Exquisite wines, scenic views, and exclusive barrel tastings in the Vale dos Vinhedos
description:
Delight yourself with a sensory journey through the prestigious Vale dos Vinhedos, in Southern Brazil. Visit family-owned wineries and historic estates, where the tradition of winemaking has been passed down from generation to generation. Walk through the vineyards and understand the secrets of a unique terroir.
Exclusive barrel tastings are paired with rich local gastronomy, inspired by Italian heritage. A sophisticated, relaxing experience tailor-made for the most demanding palates.

name: The Jalapão Star Gazer
summary: The most remote and stunningly beautiful places for seeing the night sky in the Jalapão State Park
description:
Venture into the heart of the Brazilian cerrado, where light pollution does not exist and the universe reveals itself in all its glory. Jalapão is famous for its crystal-clear natural springs, golden dunes, and imposing rock formations that serve as the stage for incomparable astronomical observation nights.
Contemplate constellations, shooting stars, and the Milky Way with the naked eye while listening to the sound of untouched nature. An experience of pure contemplation and spiritual peace in the middle of central Brazil.

name: The Bioluminescent Explorer
summary: Enjoy the glowing bioluminescent waters and starry skies in Ilha do Mel, Brazil
description:
Witness the magic of nature on the dark nights of Ilha do Mel. Far from the city lights, you will have the rare opportunity to see the ocean glow with the spectacle of bioluminescence. Walk along deserted beaches and watch the water light up with every step or movement of the waves.
This car-free island full of charming trails offers the perfect refuge. Combine the nocturnal mystery of the glowing waters with sunny days on pristine beaches and visits to historic fortresses.
